[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010100001 3
1 011001111 6
2 011001011 5
3 111111110 8
4 100100110 4
5 001100001 3
6 010111110 6
7 010100001 3

56 65 111111111 a
67 76 111111111 a
70 07 110100111 6
